title: Chronicles (disambiguation)
content:
'''Chronicles''' could refer to the following:
*[[Chronicle]]
:*The Chronicle was a colorful mosaic that decorated the interior of the [[Prime Chamber]] in the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[The Colony|Colony]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yoggoy]].
*[[Chronicles of the Old Republic]]
:*An in-universe historical document from the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]] website, covering the [[Old Sith Wars]].
*[[The Stele Chronicles]]
:*A short story booklet packaged with [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|Star Wars: TIE Fighter]], expanding upon the character [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
*[[Star Wars Chronicles]]
:*A reference book that covers the [[Original trilogy]], published by Chronicle Books.
*[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]
:*A reference book that covers the [[Prequel trilogy]], published by Chronicle Books.
*[[Chronicle Books]]
:*A Star Wars book publishing company.
{{Disambig}}
